encassConfigs.name: ValidateOpenAPISample-1.0
encassConfigs.description: Demonstrates how to validate an incoming request against an OpenAPI 3.x specification published by the Layer7 API Developer Portal. The OpenAPI document is read from the Portal-managed service property service.property.internal.apiSpec; validation is performed by the Layer7 'Validate Against OpenAPI Document' assertion. A drop-down argument (l7.enum.option) lets the publisher choose a Validation Profile (path, path_and_method, request, or request_strict); each profile sets every option on the assertion explicitly (ValidatePath, ValidateMethod, ValidateHeaders, ValidateQueryParameters, ValidateBody, RequireSecurityCredentials, StrictValidation, plus UseOpenApiDocAsUrl and the result-variable Prefix), so the bundle exercises the assertion's full option surface and serves as a starting point for any validation policy. Validation results are exposed via openapi.path, openapi.expandedPath, openapi.servers and openapi.errors.

policy.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="***************************************************************************************************************************"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Policy Fragment: ValidateOpenAPISample-1.0"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" "/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Validates an incoming request against the OpenAPI specification published by the Portal in service.property.internal.apiSpec."/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="The Validation Profile drop-down (l7.enum.option) selects which combination of options is enabled on the underlying"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="'Validate Against OpenAPI Document' assertion. Each branch below sets every option explicitly so that the assertion's"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="full surface area is visible at a glance:"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" "/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  OpenApiDoc                 - context variable (or URL, see UseOpenApiDocAsUrl) holding the OpenAPI 3.x spec"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  UseOpenApiDocAsUrl         - if true, treat OpenApiDoc as a URL to fetch the spec from"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  Prefix                     - prefix for output variables, e.g. ${openapi.errors}, ${openapi.path}, ${openapi.servers}"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  ValidatePath               - validate request URI matches a defined operation (disabling this disables all other checks)"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  ValidateMethod             - validate the HTTP method is allowed for the resolved path"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  ValidateHeaders            - validate request headers against header parameters in the spec"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  ValidateQueryParameters    - validate query-parameter names and types"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  ValidateBody               - validate JSON request body against the operation's schema"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  RequireSecurityCredentials - require credentials defined in the spec to be present (does not authenticate them)"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="  StrictValidation           - reject undefined query parameters and additional body properties"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue=" "/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Result variables (with default prefix 'openapi'): openapi.path, openapi.expandedPath, openapi.servers, openapi.errors, openapi.errorDetails."/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="***************************************************************************************************************************"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
        <L7p:SetVariable>
            <L7p:Base64Expression stringValue="JHtsNy5lbnVtLm9wdGlvbn0="/>
            <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="option"/>
        </L7p:SetVariable>
        <wsp:OneOrMore wsp:Usage="Required">
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                    <L7p:Comment stringValue="Profile: path - validate URI path only"/>
                </L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${option}"/>
                    <L7p:Operator operatorNull="null"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item dataType="included">
                            <L7p:Type variableDataType="string"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                        <L7p:item binary="included">
                            <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                            <L7p:RightValue stringValue="path"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                    </L7p:Predicates>
                </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <L7p:OpenApi>
                    <L7p:OpenApiDoc stringValue="service.property.internal.apiSpec"/>
                    <L7p:UseOpenApiDocAsUrl booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Prefix stringValue="openapi"/>
                    <L7p:ValidatePath booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateMethod booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateHeaders booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateQueryParameters booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateBody booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:RequireSecurityCredentials booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:StrictValidation booleanValue="false"/>
                </L7p:OpenApi>
            </wsp:All>
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                    <L7p:Comment stringValue="Profile: path_and_method - validate URI path + HTTP method"/>
                </L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${option}"/>
                    <L7p:Operator operatorNull="null"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item dataType="included">
                            <L7p:Type variableDataType="string"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                        <L7p:item binary="included">
                            <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                            <L7p:RightValue stringValue="path_and_method"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                    </L7p:Predicates>
                </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <L7p:OpenApi>
                    <L7p:OpenApiDoc stringValue="service.property.internal.apiSpec"/>
                    <L7p:UseOpenApiDocAsUrl booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Prefix stringValue="openapi"/>
                    <L7p:ValidatePath booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateMethod booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateHeaders booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateQueryParameters booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateBody booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:RequireSecurityCredentials booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:StrictValidation booleanValue="false"/>
                </L7p:OpenApi>
            </wsp:All>
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                    <L7p:Comment stringValue="Profile: request - full request validation (path, method, headers, query, body, security)"/>
                </L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${option}"/>
                    <L7p:Operator operatorNull="null"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item dataType="included">
                            <L7p:Type variableDataType="string"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                        <L7p:item binary="included">
                            <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                            <L7p:RightValue stringValue="request"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                    </L7p:Predicates>
                </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <L7p:OpenApi>
                    <L7p:OpenApiDoc stringValue="service.property.internal.apiSpec"/>
                    <L7p:UseOpenApiDocAsUrl booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Prefix stringValue="openapi"/>
                    <L7p:ValidatePath booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateMethod booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateHeaders booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateQueryParameters booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateBody booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:RequireSecurityCredentials booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:StrictValidation booleanValue="false"/>
                </L7p:OpenApi>
            </wsp:All>
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:CommentAssertion>
                    <L7p:Comment stringValue="Profile: request_strict - full request validation in strict mode"/>
                </L7p:CommentAssertion>
                <L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                    <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${option}"/>
                    <L7p:Operator operatorNull="null"/>
                    <L7p:Predicates predicates="included">
                        <L7p:item dataType="included">
                            <L7p:Type variableDataType="string"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                        <L7p:item binary="included">
                            <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/>
                            <L7p:RightValue stringValue="request_strict"/>
                        </L7p:item>
                    </L7p:Predicates>
                </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
                <L7p:OpenApi>
                    <L7p:OpenApiDoc stringValue="service.property.internal.apiSpec"/>
                    <L7p:UseOpenApiDocAsUrl booleanValue="false"/>
                    <L7p:Prefix stringValue="openapi"/>
                    <L7p:ValidatePath booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateMethod booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateHeaders booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateQueryParameters booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:ValidateBody booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:RequireSecurityCredentials booleanValue="true"/>
                    <L7p:StrictValidation booleanValue="true"/>
                </L7p:OpenApi>
            </wsp:All>
            <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
                <L7p:AuditDetailAssertion>
                    <L7p:Detail stringValue="*** OpenAPI validation failed for profile '${option}': ${openapi.errorDetails}"/>
                </L7p:AuditDetailAssertion>
                <L7p:CustomizeErrorResponse>
                    <L7p:Content stringValueReference="inline"><![CDATA[{
  "error": {
    "code": 500,
    "message": "OpenAPI spec validation failed. Profile: ${option}"
  }
}]]></L7p:Content>
                    <L7p:ContentType stringValue="application/json; charset=UTF-8"/>
                    <L7p:ExtraHeaders nameValuePairArray="included"/>
                </L7p:CustomizeErrorResponse>
                <L7p:FalseAssertion/>
            </wsp:All>
        </wsp:OneOrMore>
    </wsp:All>
</wsp:Policy>
